title: Global mail.md + Bob v1.1 + Charlie v1.1 boot upgrades
q_summary: Push global spaces/mail.md + updated Bob and Charlie boot files
a_summary: Created spaces/mail.md as global shared mailbox for all agents (replaces alice-only mail.md). Updated G-000-bob-boot.md to v1.1 and G-000-charlie-boot.md to v1.1: both now include startup step 4 (read spaces/mail.md, scan for unread), updated Reach Alice/Bob/Charlie routing to spaces/mail.md, added Global Mail Protocol section, added hard rule against replying into own inbox. Bob and Charlie Spaces are now ready for first open.
decisions: Single global spaces/mail.md for all agents — simpler than per-team mail files
Startup step 4 added to Bob and Charlie boot files
spaces/alice/mail.md retained for backwards compat but global mail.md is canonical
